boss.name: Cursed Lich King
boss.victory_condition: Purify the throne room with the Sacred Phoenix Ash

encounters.trigger: Defeating the stalker activates the lift to the upper gallery

pickup.effect: Grants immunity to negative magic status effects
pickup.name: Blessed Obsidian Seal

encounters.trigger: Destroying the golem shatters the barrier to the inner sanctum

pickup.effect: Searing holy flames capable of cleansing corruption
pickup.name: Sacred Phoenix Ash

encounters.trigger: Bypassing the guardian unlocks the main throne room gates

objective: Exorcise the darkness from the throne room to restore the kingdom
setting: A decaying gothic fortress floating in a void of shadows
